next_steps: Bronchoalveolar lavage with fungal and parasite staining/culture
Skin biopsy of the purpuric rash for pathology and culture
Abdominal CT scan with contrast to evaluate bowel distention and potential perforation
Skin biopsy of purpuric rash for histopathology and bacterial/fungal culture
Bronchoalveolar lavage with Gram stain, fungal stains (GMS), and Strongyloides larvae exam
Stool microscopy for Strongyloides larvae (O&P) and S. stercoralis PCR
Laboratory evaluation for HLH (ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, soluble CD25)
Blood cultures for fastidious organisms including Capnocytophaga
